title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to authorizing the Division of Capital Asset Management and Maintenance to grant easements to NSTAR electric company d/b/a Eversource Energy in return for NSTAR releasing or modifying easements for the benefit of the Commonwealth.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, April 16, 2026 -- The committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight, to whom was referred the Senate Bill authorizing the Division of Capital Asset Management and Maintenance to grant easements to NSTAR electric company d/b/a Eversource Energy in return for NSTAR releasing or modifying easements for the benefit of the Commonwealth, report the accompanying Order (Senate, No. 3058).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight (under JR10)
Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules

sponsorships.name: Joint Committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
